final:
module counter_32bit (  
    input clk,  
    input reset,  
    input enable,  
    output reg [31:0] count  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            count <= 32'd0;  
        end else if (enable) begin  
            count <= count + 1;  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
